overall.description: A first-person exploration of a rainy harbor dock at night in a video game. The player walks past wooden Western-style buildings, under a large metal crane, along the waterfront past moored boats, and through a covered market area illuminated by warm gas lamps against a dark stormy sky.

agents.ego_description: walking along the wooden dock past western-style buildings toward the harbor crane

entered.detail: western-style wooden building with OFFICE sign and warm lantern light
small wooden structure with red trim
tall wooden post with warm glowing lantern
large industrial metal crane structure silhouetted against the night sky

segments.scene_description: The scene opens on a rainy night at a wooden harbor dock. The camera moves past a wooden office building with warm lantern light, heading toward a large metal crane structure in the distance. The wooden planks glisten with rain under the glow of gas lamps.

events.description: enters the large metal harbor crane structure
rain becomes heavier and more visible against the dark sky

agents.ego_description: walking under the large metal crane structure along the dock

entered.detail: white painted wooden railing along the dock edge

segments.scene_description: The camera passes under the massive metal crane structure that dominates the dock. Rain falls heavily as the view opens toward the water. The wooden office building recedes behind as the camera moves deeper into the harbor area.

scene_state.functional_zone: open waterfront dock with moored boats

events.description: exits the crane structure to open waterfront
turns around to head back toward the town buildings

agents.ego_description: walking along the dock railing toward a moored boat, then turning back toward town

entered.detail: wooden boat with lit cabin and white railings moored at the dock
dark choppy water of the harbor

segments.scene_description: Emerging from under the crane, the camera moves along the open waterfront dock toward a moored boat with a lit cabin. The dark harbor water stretches to the horizon. After reaching the boat, the camera turns to head back toward the distant lights of the town.

scene_state.functional_zone: dock town center with covered market

events.description: enters the covered market warehouse structure

agents.ego_description: walking back toward the town center, passing the office building and entering a covered market area

entered.detail: prominent two-story wooden building with illuminated green signage
open-sided wooden warehouse with roof and stacked crates
stacks of wooden shipping crates and boxes

segments.scene_description: Returning to the town side of the dock, the camera approaches a large wooden building with green signage before entering a covered market warehouse filled with wooden crates and barrels. The warm lamplight contrasts with the dark rainy night outside.

scene_state.functional_zone: open dock storage area with cargo

events.description: exits the covered market back to open dock

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered market and continuing along the dock past stacked barrels

entered.detail: distant warm lights from harbor buildings across the water

segments.scene_description: The camera exits the covered warehouse to an open dock area lined with wooden barrels and cargo. Walking along the rain-slicked planks, the view alternates between the dark harbor waters and the warm glow of gas lamps illuminating the dock.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rain-slicked harbor dock that transitions from an open industrial waterfront into the sheltered warmth of a cargo warehouse. It begins by gliding past a wooden office building illuminated by lanterns, moving toward a massive metal crane that looms over the glistening planks. As the camera passes under the crane's structure, the view opens toward the dark harbor waters and a moored boat with a lit cabin before turning back toward the distant lights of the town. The scene then shifts as the camera approaches a building with green signage and enters a covered market warehouse filled with crates and barrels under a warm glow. Finally, the camera exits the warehouse back into the rainy night, moving along the dock where the light of gas lamps contrasts with the dark, stormy horizon.
